title: PDB3D's Bare Bones Details
body:
Replaces bland Bare Bones textures, mostly the ones that are a solid color, like Ice, leaves etc. Leaves are transparent unless disabled in minecraft's settings. they will still have a texture if not transparent.

also fixes the water flowing animation.

Requires to be loaded ABOVE [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones)

Compatible with Voxy. Unlike some other Bare Bones leaves resource packs, leaves in Voxy LOD's won't still be rendered as a single color.

![Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PN6qtmq2/images/99e4f45e8eeb443c67bbc690414b8e020b155a9a.png)
